testcase.name: test_categories

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (True and 6 == 5) + where True = isinstance([{'description': 'Disciplined founder reads on building, growing, and sustaining ventures.', 'id': testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:38: in test_categories assert isinstance(data, list) and len(data) == 5 E AssertionError: assert (True and 6 == 5) E + where True =
